summary: The route exposes tenant data without authorization and has no regression test.

findings.title: Tenant data can be read without authorization
findings.explanation: The new account route trusts a request parameter and does not authenticate or scope the database query.
findings.suggestedFix: Authenticate the caller and scope the lookup to the authenticated tenant.

findings.title: Authorization behavior has no test
findings.explanation: No test covers unauthenticated or cross-tenant access for the new route.
findings.suggestedFix: Add rejection tests for unauthenticated and cross-tenant requests.
